title: Billing worker backlog after dependency upgrade
summary: Billing queue latency climbs sharply after workers are redeployed with a dependency upgrade.
customer_impact: Invoice and receipt events are delayed because billing jobs are not being processed on time.
initial_signals: Alert: billing queue depth grew from 120 to 8,400 jobs within 12 minutes.
Workers restarted after image rollout billing-worker:2026.03.18-2.
No corresponding increase in database CPU or lock wait times.

timeline.event: Workers begin failing message deserialization during event handling.
